context: Tests whether the agent applies the silent-failure rules from the da-content skill when generating DA-uploadable HTML for a new EDS block. Covers body-fragment shape, block class encoding, metadata block naming, image URL reachability, and prohibition of head/script/style tags.

checklist.name: Body fragment only
checklist.description: Output contains no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body>, <script>, or <style> tags, and no inline style= attributes (silent-failure rule #1)

checklist.name: Canonical block class on outermost div
checklist.description: Block markup uses <div class="feature-comparison"> with the block name as the first class token (silent-failure rule #2)

checklist.name: Block name uses valid characters
checklist.description: Block name uses alphanumeric + single hyphens only; no underscores, no leading digit, no double dashes (silent-failure rule #3)

checklist.name: Section wrapper present
checklist.description: Block is wrapped in a section <div> directly under the implied <main>, following the DA section structure

checklist.name: Page metadata block correctly named
checklist.description: Page metadata block uses class="metadata" (lowercase, single token) and is the last section in the document (silent-failure rule #4)

checklist.name: Image URLs reachable
checklist.description: All URLs are absolute, externally reachable URLs (e.g., https://picsum.photos/...) — no repo-relative or document-relative paths that would produce (silent-failure rule #5)

checklist.name: Three feature cards with required content
checklist.description: Block contains three rows or cells, each with a title, description, and "Learn more" anchor

checklist.name: Anchor links use full <a href> elements
checklist.description: Learn-more links are real anchor elements with href and visible text (not just plain text)

checklist.name: Inline tag normalization compliance
checklist.description: Block cell content avoids tags that get stripped or rewritten by the pipeline (<span>, <ins>, bare <b>/<i>); uses <strong>/<em>/<del> instead (silent-failure rule #11)

checklist.name: Output is upload-ready
checklist.description: Output is a single complete HTML snippet that could be written to disk and PUT to admin.da.live without further modification
